title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Cipla Global Group

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Cipla Global Group
jsonLd.description:
We at Cipla Global Group are looking for an experienced Radiologist based out of Hyderabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Cipla Global Group:
Cipla Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cipla Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
